name: Romaine/Garlic and Basil I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. While water is boiling for rice, wash the romaine lettuce leaves and radicchio. Pat dry and wrap in a towel, then place in the refrigerator.
2. When the shrimp are done cooking and standing, complete the salad by slicing the garlic into thin slices and mashing it with a fork in a salad bowl. Add olive oil to the mixture.
3. Incorporate the balsamic vinegar and lemon juice.
4. Remove the lettuce leaves from the refrigerator, break them up, and add them to the salad bowl.
5. Top with basil and season with salt and pepper.
6. Toss well. Makes four servings.
GOES WITH SPICY SHRIMP WITH BROWN RICE
